rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.225 governs opioid antagonist prescriptions in schools. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: A physician or person who has been delegated prescriptive authority under Chapter 157, Occupations Code, may prescribe opioid antagonists in the name of a school district, open-enrollment charter school, or private school.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
